name: Compute & Data Processing SLA
description: Service-level agreement for ongoing compute, infrastructure, or data processing. Covers performance guarantees, auto-scaling, GDPR data handling, and breach remedies.

client_name.description: Legal name of the client entity

client_agent_id.description: Wallet address of the client agent

provider_name.description: Legal name of the service provider

provider_agent_id.description: Wallet address of the provider agent

service_description.description: Detailed description of compute/data services provided

monthly_fee.description: Base monthly fee in specified currency

max_scaling_multiplier.description: Maximum auto-scale factor (e.g. 2x = up to double base resources)

data_processing_location.description: GDPR: geographic restriction on data processing

data_deletion_on_termination.description: Whether provider deletes all client data on contract end

breach_credit_percent.description: Service credit percentage per SLA breach incident
